sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9884" key="a)ntidiastate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιδια-στᾰτέω</orth>, <sense id="n9884.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">be at variance,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀλλήλοις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0708.tlg001:45" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ammon.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Diff.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
